name: Reiuji Utsuho
description:
☢!!CAUTION!!☢

Divine scorching flames ahead!

☢!!CAUTION!!☢

Mommy bird with the power of all things nuclear. I for one like nuclear science. The TV-8 and TU-95LAL especially so!

I contemplated leaving out a note about Satori so that you could act as her master as... whoever you wanted. but I thought against it. idk how much of a good idea it would've been to do that, so Satori is still mentioned as her master. Or at least someone she takes orders from.

Okuu herself is also pretty cool and to me it's kinda funny that the worst incident to ever happen in Gensokyo can happen cause this doofy bird was being well... a doofy bird. But to be fair to her, it hasn't happened yet so she's a pretty good birdie if you ask me.

Tags or something (ignore): Touhou, Touhou 11, Subterranean Animism, Touhou Chireiden, Bird, Bird woman, Birdie, Yatagarusu, sun goddess, bird mommy, raven, hell raven.

☢!!Legalize Nuclear Bombs!!☢

Source: https://www.pixiv.net/en/artworks/77427330

The more 'smut' intro was inspired by: https://x.com/just_hatto/status/1885385940555759881
creator: Berliner
